suite.name: suite S1780237619363 1

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 - Login With Locked User Should Display Error Message

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Locked Account
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Error Message Should Indicate Account Is Locked
Get Error Message Text
Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: ${msg} = Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 - Sort Products By Price Low To High Should Reorder Products

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Standard Account
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: When User Selects Sort By Price Low To High
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css=.product_sort_container' by value lohi.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Then Products Should Be Sorted By Price Ascending
Get All Product Prices
Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

test.name: TC_003 - Remove Item From Cart Should Empty The Cart

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Standard Account
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: When User Adds First Product To Cart
Click First Add To Cart Button
Click Button
kw.msg: Button with locator 'css=.inventory_item button' not found.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: Button with locator 'css=.inventory_item button' not found.
Button with locator 'css=.inventory_item button' not found.
Button with locator 'css=.inventory_item button' not found.

kw.name: And User Navigates To Cart Page
When User Removes The Item From Cart
Then Cart Should Be Empty And Badge Should Disappear
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Button with locator 'css=.inventory_item button' not found.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Tests SauceDemo - Connexion verrouillée, tri par prix, suppression panier
